phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Citadel museum ticket booth is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira do Museu da Cidadela?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO moo-ZEHOO DUH see-duh-DEH-luh?
phrases.cultural_note: Cultural sites use standardized directional cues to guide tourists efficiently through historic layouts.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Cidadela de Cascais. Lá encontrará a bilheteira ou pode pedir ajuda na receção ou ao Guia da Cidadela.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH see-duh-DEH-luh DIH kuhsh-KEYESH. LAH ayng-koongt-ruh-RAH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW PAW-dih pih-DEER uh-ZHOO-duh NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW OW GEEUH DUH see-duh-DEH-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Citadel of Cascais. There you will find the ticket booth, or you can ask for help at the reception or with the Citadel guide.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Citadel of Cascais. There you will find the ticket booth, or you can ask for help at the reception or with the Citadel guide.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH see-duh-DEH-luh DIH kuhsh-KEYESH. LAH ayng-koongt-ruh-RAH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW PAW-dih pih-DEER uh-ZHOO-duh NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW OW GEEUH DUH see-duh-DEH-luh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Cidadela de Cascais. Lá encontrará a bilheteira ou pode pedir ajuda na receção ou ao Guia da Cidadela.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist info kiosk at Praça is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque de informações turísticas na Praça 5 de Outubro?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee see loh-kah-LEE-zah oo POHS-toh jee too-REEZ-moo nah PRAH-sah
phrases.cultural_note: Fountains and monuments are standard reference points for locating services in Portuguese plazas.

likely_response.local: Fica na Praça 5 de Outubro, perto da Cidadela.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh NUH PRAH-suh SEEN-koo DIH oow-TOOB-roo, PEHR-too DUH see-duh-DEH-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: It is at Praça 5 de Outubro, near the Citadel.

responses.english: It is at Praça 5 de Outubro, near the Citadel.
responses.phonetic: FEE-kuh NUH PRAH-suh SEEN-koo DIH oow-TOOB-roo, PEHR-too DUH see-duh-DEH-luh.
responses.local: Fica na Praça 5 de Outubro, perto da Cidadela.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Citadel museum ticket booth is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de bilhetes do museu da Cidadela?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh DOO moo-ZEHOO DUH see-duh-DEH-luh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Citadel museum (Museu da Cidadela) is located within the historic Cidadela de Cascais fortress.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Cidadela de Cascais e pergunte ao guia da Cidadela.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH see-duh-DEH-luh DIH kuhsh-KEYESH EH peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH DUH see-duh-DEH-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Citadel of Cascais and ask the Citadel guide.

responses.local: Siga as placas para a Cidadela de Cascais e pergunte ao guia da Cidadela.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Rua da Liberdade is
phrases.text_local: Sabe indicar o caminho para a Rua da Liberdade?
phrases.pronunciation: SAH-bih een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh AH ROOUH DUH lee-bih-ruh-DAH-dih?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese service staff favor concise, actionable directions to maintain efficient visitor flow.

phrases.intent_en: Which way to Rua da Liberdade?
phrases.text_local: Por favor, onde fica a Rua da Liberdade?
phrases.pronunciation: POOR fuh-VOHR, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ROOUH DUH lee-bih-ruh-DAH-dih?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese historic centers, directions rely on landmarks and relative turns rather than GPS coordinates.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Rua da Liberdade.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ROOUH DUH lee-bih-ruh-DAH-dih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Rua da Liberdade.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, onde fica o Mercado da Vila?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo DUH VEE-luh?
phrases.cultural_note: Mercado da Vila is a popular market for fresh produce and local goods, often busy in the morning.

likely_response.local: Na Rua da Liberdade, perto da praia.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH ROOUH DUH lee-bih-ruh-DAH-dih, PEHR-too DUH PREYEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: On Rua da Liberdade, near the beach.
